# Carlos Posada — Cloud & DevOps Engineer (Full Context)

> Carlos Posada is a Cloud & DevOps Engineer based in Medellín, Colombia. He architects high-velocity deployment pipelines and resilient cloud ecosystems, specializing in Infrastructure as Code, automated quality gates, and AI-driven operations. He is currently open to work and available for full-time positions, freelance projects, and collaboration.

## Professional Profile

**Name:** Carlos Posada
**Title:** Cloud & DevOps Engineer | AI Solutions Lead | QA Automation Specialist
**Location:** Medellín, Colombia (COT, UTC-5)
**Email:** hello@carlosposada.dev
**Website:** https://carlosposada.dev
**Status:** Open to Work

Carlos has 10+ years of experience in software engineering, with deep expertise across three domains:

### 1. DevOps & Cloud Engineering
Architecting cloud-native ecosystems that prioritize resilience and speed. He focuses on the structural pulse of deployments, ensuring 99.9% availability through automated orchestration.

**Capabilities:**
- CI/CD Pipelines: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Pulumi, AWS CloudFormation, AWS CDK
- Container Orchestration: Kubernetes, Docker, Helm, Istio
- Cloud Providers: AWS (primary), GCP, Azure
- Site Reliability Engineering: Prometheus, Grafana, PagerDuty
- DevSecOps: Vault, security hardening, compliance automation

### 2. QA Automation
Ensuring zero-defect releases through end-to-end automated testing strategies. He builds frameworks that act as the immune system for software architecture.

**Capabilities:**
- E2E Testing: Playwright, Cypress, Selenium
- API Testing: RestAssured, Postman, k6
- Performance & Load Testing: k6, JMeter, Locust
- Visual Regression Testing: Percy, Chromatic
- Test Data Management & CI integration

### 3. AI-powered Solutions
Integrating machine intelligence into the engineering lifecycle. From LLM-assisted coding agents to predictive infrastructure scaling, he builds the next generation of smart systems.

**Capabilities:**
- Custom LLM Implementation & Fine-tuning
- RAG Pipeline Architecture (LangChain, vector databases)
- AIOps for Anomaly Detection
- MLOps Training Workflows (PyTorch, MLflow)
- Self-healing test frameworks using LLM-based element analysis

## Technical Skills

**Cloud & Infrastructure:** AWS, GCP, Azure, Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker, Helm, Istio, Envoy, Vault
**CI/CD & DevOps:** GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, ArgoCD, Prometheus, Grafana
**Programming:** Python, TypeScript, Go, Java, Bash
**Testing:** Playwright, Selenium, Cypress, RestAssured, k6, Postman
**AI/ML:** PyTorch, LangChain, AutoGPT, RAG, MLOps, LLM fine-tuning
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, Redis, Pinecone, Weaviate

## Career History

1. **AI Solutions Lead** (2022 — Present)
   Spearheading the integration of LLMs into enterprise CI/CD pipelines. Developed self-healing test suites and predictive analytics for deployment risk assessment.
   Technologies: PyTorch, LangChain, AutoGPT

2. **Senior Cloud / DevOps Engineer** (2018 — 2022)
   Orchestrated large-scale Kubernetes migrations and implemented Infrastructure as Code across AWS and Azure environments for Fortune 500 fintech clients.
   Technologies: Terraform, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions

3. **QA Automation Specialist** (2014 — 2018)
   Established automated testing frameworks from scratch, reducing regression testing cycles by 70%. Pioneered Shift-Left testing culture.
   Technologies: Selenium, Jenkins, TypeScript

## Featured Projects

1. **Automated Multi-Cloud Drifting Engine** — A real-time monitoring tool that detects configuration drift across AWS and GCP environments using Terraform state analysis. Tags: Terraform, Python, Prometheus.

2. **Self-Healing Automation Framework** — AI-powered Selenium framework that automatically updates selectors and heals flaky tests using LLM-based element analysis. Tags: Selenium, OpenAI API, Java.

3. **Infrastructure Intelligence Bot** — A Slack-integrated AI agent that troubleshoots production logs and provides root cause analysis for incident response. Tags: LangChain, AWS Lambda, Docker.

4. **KubeStreamer v2** — Automated CI/CD pipeline for high-availability Kubernetes clusters with real-time log streaming and thermal monitoring. Tags: Kubernetes, Terraform, Go.

5. **Sentinel QA Hub** — End-to-end testing orchestration platform using Playwright and Python, featuring automated regression reports and Slack integration. Tags: Playwright, Python, GitHub Actions.

## How to Hire Carlos Posada

Visit https://carlosposada.dev/contact to send a message through the contact form, or email hello@carlosposada.dev directly. Response time is typically within 24 hours. Carlos is available for:
- Full-time remote positions (Cloud/DevOps/SRE roles)
- Freelance infrastructure and automation projects
- Technical collaboration and consulting
